---
id: message-notifications
title: "Message Notifications"
description: "Resend transaction notifications (SMS, email, WhatsApp) for a specific payment transaction identified by `session_id` or `order_no`."
sidebar_label: "Message Notifications"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Message Notifications"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/message-notification/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resend transaction notifications (SMS, email, WhatsApp) for a specific payment transaction identified by `session_id` or `order_no`.


<pre style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://ksa.ottu.dev/b/pbl/v2/message-notification/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"session_id\": \"string\",\n  \"order_no\": \"string\",\n  \"channels\": [\n    \"sms\",\n    \"email\"\n  ]\n}'"}</pre>

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./message-notifications.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./message-notifications.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
